image.alt: Víctor Manuel Canchola in his studio

bio.intro: I'm Víctor Manuel Canchola Cervantes, music producer and composer from Querétaro, México.
paragraphs: I specialize in creating and producing music for audiovisual media: video games, animation, and short films.
I'm the founder of Juliette!, a band where we blend alternative rock with Japanese rock, bossa nova, and Latin sound.
bio.quote: Sound doesn't accompany the image — it completes it.
